title: trifolium andinum var. podocephalum
intro: Trifolium andinum var. podocephalum, also known as 'Peruvian clover', is a plant species within the legume family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting wound healing due to its antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Trifolium andinum var. podocephalum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
